calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Manfred appeared by telephone for Denise Loughran (Petitioner).

Mr. Manfred stated that the Administrator is willing to reduce her fees by the amount paid to her Son for cleaning out the property, that one of the beneficiaries was on his death bed and needed his distribution, and that they had to pay a courier twice for delivering courtesy copies of two separate declarations on different days (a day apart) from Napa. The Second and Final Account and Report, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Aug-23-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Off Calendar
